title: Add imggenpro to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [imggenpro](https://imggengpt.pro/) to image
- Create and enhance.

Fixes #9994

gist.headline: A new sprout: imggenpro
gist.blurb: The greenhouse gets a little more crowded. imggenpro just dropped into the community showcase for all your image creation needs.
gist.summary: Added imggenpro, a new image creation and enhancement tool, to the community app showcase in the Greenhouse.
gist.impact: The community can now discover imggenpro alongside other community-built tools in the apps directory.
gist.visual_concept: The PR adds a new app to the 'Greenhouse' (community showcase). Visuals should feature Polly the bee in a cozy greenhouse setting, tending to a new 'sprout' that looks like a glowing picture frame or canvas, representing the image generation app.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny gardener's hat, watering a glowing picture frame sprouting from a lime green (#ecf874) flower pot inside a glass greenhouse. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
